data.projectDetailsTitle: Automation Development to Support Disability Benefit Decision Making
data.projectDetailsDescription: Project is to increase our use of automation technologies to improve throughput of disability decisions and reduce the overall backlog.
data.impact8: Determination of eligibility for disability benefits will have an impact on access to health services as well as the financial situation of the client.
data.impact10: These are eligibility determinations with no impact on rights/freedoms.
data.impact12: Disability benefits impact overall wellness and possibly financial well-being.
data.impact14: Disability awards will impact financial well-being.
data.impact16: This is eligibility for individuals and does not relate to the environment.
data.motivation-other: Reduction of cumbersome administrative tasks to free up more time for staff to dedicate to decision making. Contribute to consistency in decision making.
data.consultationDesign2-other:
Training Unit
Bureau of Pensions Advocates
Office of the Veterans Ombudsman
